c24948.st: Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and a brother of James,

c24949.st: To those who [are] ... loved by God [the] Father,

c24950.st: called, ... and kept in Jesus Christ:

c24951.st: Mercy, peace, and love be multiplied to you.

c24953.st: to write you about the salvation we share,

c24954.st: I felt it necessary to write ... you

c24956.st: to contend earnestly for the faith entrusted once for all to the saints.

c24957.st: For certain men have crept in [among you] unnoticed —

c24960.st: They turn the grace of our God into a license for immorality,

c24961.st: and they deny our only Master and Lord, Jesus Christ.

c24963.st: Although you are fully aware of this,

c24964.st: that ... Jesus had delivered [His] people out of [the] land of Egypt,

c24965.st: after ... He destroyed those who did not believe.

c24966.st: And [the] angels who did not stay within their [own] domain,

c24969.st: He keeps under darkness, in eternal chains

c24970.st: Sodom and Gomorrah and the cities around them,

c24971.st: In like manner, ... who indulged in sexual immorality

c24973.st: are on display as an example

c24974.st: of those who sustain [the] punishment of eternal fire.

c24975.st: Yet in the same way, these dreamers defile [their] bodies,

c24979.st: when he disputed with the devil

c24982.st: to bring a slanderous judgment {against him},

c24985.st: These [men], however, slander ... they do not understand,

c24986.st: what ... and like irrational animals, ... they do instinctively.

c24987.st: they will be destroyed by the things

c24989.st: They have traveled the path of Cain;

c24990.st: they have rushed headlong into the error of Balaam;

c24991.st: they have perished in Korah᾽s rebellion.

c24992.st: These [men] are the hidden reefs in your love feasts,

c24995.st: [They are] clouds without water, carried along by [the] wind;

c24999.st: [They are] wild waves of [the] sea, foaming up their [own] shame;

c25001.st: for whom blackest darkness has been reserved forever.

c25002.st: Enoch, [the] seventh from Adam, also prophesied about them

c25004.st: “Behold, [the] Lord is coming with myriads of His holy [ones]

c25010.st: spoken against Him by ungodly sinners.”

c25014.st: they flatter others for their own advantage.

c25019.st: “In [the] last times there will be scoffers

c25020.st: who will follow after their own ungodly desires.”

c25021.st: These are the [ones who] cause divisions, [who are] worldly

c25023.st: But you, beloved, by building yourselves {up} in your most holy faith

c25025.st: keep yourselves in [the] love of God

c25026.st: as you await the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ

c25028.st: And indeed, have mercy on those who doubt;

c25031.st: and to still others, show mercy [tempered] with fear,

c25032.st: hating even the clothing stained by the flesh.

c25033.st: Now to Him who is able to keep you from stumbling

c25034.st: and to present [you] unblemished in His glorious presence, with great joy —

c25035.st: to [the] only God our Savior ... through Jesus Christ our Lord,

c25037.st: before all time, and now, and for all eternity. Amen.
